mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `petlog`.`feed_comment` (feed_id, user_id, content, parent_comment_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{feedId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentCommentId}, NOW(), null)
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT `t1`.`id` AS commentId, `t1`.`feed_id` AS feedId, `t1`.`user_id` AS userId, `t1`.`parent_comment_id` AS parentCommentId, `t1`.`content` AS content, `t1`.`created_at` AS createdAt, `t1`.`updated_at` AS updatedAt, `t2`.`nickname` AS nickname, `t3`.image_url AS profileImageUrl FROM `petlog`.`feed_comment` AS `t1` JOIN petlog.personal_user AS `t2` ON `t1`.user_id = `t2`.`user_id` LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`pets` AS `t3` ON `t1`.user_id = `t3`.`user_id` AND `t3`.`is_primary` = 1 WHERE `t1`.feed_id = #{feedId} ORDER BY COALESCE(t1.parent_comment_id, t1.id), t1.parent_comment_id IS NOT NULL, t1.created_at

SELECT `t1`.`id` AS `commentId`, `t1`.`feed_id` AS `feedId`, `t1`.`user_id` AS `userId`, `t1`.`parent_comment_id` AS `parentCommentId`, `t1`.`content` AS `content`, `t1`.`created_at` AS `createdAt`, `t1`.`updated_at` AS `updatedAt`, `t2`.`nickname` AS `nickname`, `t3`.`image_url` AS `profileImageUrl` FROM `petlog`.`feed_comment` AS `t1` JOIN `petlog`.`personal_user` AS `t2` ON `t1`.`user_id` = `t2`.`user_id` LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`pets` AS `t3` ON `t1`.`user_id` = `t3`.`user_id` AND `t3`.is_primary = 1 WHERE `t1`.`id` = #{commentId}

SELECT `id` AS `commentId`, `feed_id` AS `feedId`, `user_id` AS `userId`, `parent_comment_id` AS `parentCommentId`, `content` AS `content`, `created_at` AS `createdAt`, `updated_at` AS `updatedAt` FROM `petlog`.`feed_comment` WHERE `id` = #{commentId}
